{{Quote|Third-rate? You can torture me all you want, but there's no need to call me ''third-rate''.|Keets Freely, during an interrogation by Senator Sano Sauro|<ref name="The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web">''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]''</ref>}}
'''Keets Freely''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] writer who worked for ''[[The Coruscant Holo Net]]'' during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was one of the first to wonder why [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] was "grabbing all the power while still smiling at us."

==Biography==
[[File:Last_of_the_Jedi_by_Chris_Scalf.jpg|thumb|left|[[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], [[Curran Caladian]], [[Oryon]] and Keets Freely.]]
During the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], journalist Keets Freely discovered a plot involving the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan]] and the by-then [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. Palpatine had spent billions of taxpayer's money to create secret accounts for corporations affiliated with the IGBC, in exchange of the IGBC's support in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Freely attempted to publish his discovery, but the editor would not allow that. Freely then resigned.<ref name="TLotJ9">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]''</ref>

When Palpatine became the [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]], the newly-formed [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] sentenced Freely to death. Freely escaped the authorities, becoming a fugitive.<ref name="TLotJ9" />

Freely became a member of the [[Erased]] after Palpatine established his [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] and issued the [[Enemy Eradication Order of Coruscant|Enemy Eradication Order]]. He was badly wounded when [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] attacked the place of Solace.

After [[Trever Flume]] and [[Oryon]] blew up the catwalk in [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace's]] base, he was found by the two, who had thought him dead. He traveled with them to [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], and later to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], where they rid the world temporarily of Imperial presence.

Keets and [[Curran Caladian]] later got information for Solace from [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Sano Sauro]]'s computer when they were helping [[Ferus Olin]] on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]]. However, they were caught and put in a holding cell but rescued by [[FLO/Legends|WA-7]], Dex's old waitress [[Droid/Legends|droid]], who gave them a blaster in their food.

Later Keets and [[Curran Caladian]] met with Solace and [[Clive Flax]] along with [[Astri Oddo]] and her son [[Lune Oddo Divinian]] in Dex's hide-out in thugger's ally. Keets and Curran Caladian dug up some information about an individual with "special powers" popping up here and there. They both got a job from [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]] to watch after [[Lune Oddo Divinian]]. They had stopped at a playground to watch him play with a group of children, but when Lune Oddo Divinian gets spotted by a group of stormtroopers doing their routine. Soon they got lost in a crowd but when they made many twist and turns storm troopers came out of the sky from an [[Airspeeder/Legends|airspeeder]], Keets was holding Lune tightly but got overpowered by stormtroopers and Lune Oddo Divinian got wrenched away. Only later did they figure out where Lune Oddo Divinian was, Keets promised to Astri Oddo that he would die getting her son back.
